_description: Wave 198: spider-brother-in-law running bit. ~38s. Status: SCRIPT BANKED, video_url fields are TODO. The visual joke: Bart's certainty contrasted with the total absence of evidence.
title: Reginald, Allegedly

voiceover.instructions: Deadpan documentary register. Slow, level, slightly weary.

segments.name: title_open
segments.text:
REGINALD

A theory held by
the Senior Cataloguer
segments.narration: Reginald. A theory held by the Senior Cataloguer.
segments.instructions: Documentary opener. 'A theory' delivered as if it were 'a memo' — same flat affect.

segments.name: bart_certainty
segments.video_url: TODO: generate Higgsfield clip — Bart at his desk, tapping a folder with one finger.
segments.narration: Bart insists Spider is a pseudonym. The pseudonym, he believes, belongs to his brother-in-law Reginald.
segments.instructions: Two sentences. 'Brother-in-law Reginald' read as one phrase, no comedic emphasis.

segments.name: evidence_absent
segments.video_url: TODO: generate Higgsfield clip — Empty desk, a phone receiver lying off the hook, no Reginald visible.
segments.narration: Reginald has not returned the office's calls. He has not, to anyone's knowledge, returned from Jaipur.
segments.instructions: Two sentences. Both delivered as standard report. 'To anyone's knowledge' said evenly, no italics.

segments.name: closing_tag
segments.instructions: Two fragments. The math is the joke. No emphasis on 'zero' — read it like 'four'.
